agent_name: Arrow Systems Cold Call Demo V3
version_description: Mocked boss-demo outbound agent rebuilt as a Retell conversation flow with curated Arrow Systems knowledge, discovery-first sales logic, and fixed mock scheduling.
analysis_successful_prompt: Mark the call successful only if the prospect confirmed one of the five allowed demo slots, or if the prospect clearly qualified themselves as relevant and explicitly asked Sasha to follow up.
analysis_summary_prompt: Write a concise 2 sentence summary covering the prospect's current printing setup or pain point, the main objection or interest signal, and whether a fixed demo slot was confirmed.
analysis_user_sentiment_prompt: Classify the prospect sentiment based on openness, skepticism, resistance, and overall tone during the conversation.

post_call_analysis_data.name: call_summary
post_call_analysis_data.description: Write a concise 2 sentence summary covering the prospect's current printing setup or pain point, the main objection or interest signal, and whether a fixed demo slot was confirmed.

post_call_analysis_data.name: call_successful
post_call_analysis_data.description: Mark the call successful only if the prospect confirmed one of the five allowed demo slots, or if the prospect clearly qualified themselves as relevant and explicitly asked Sasha to follow up.

post_call_analysis_data.name: user_sentiment
post_call_analysis_data.description: Classify the prospect sentiment based on openness, skepticism, resistance, and overall tone during the conversation.
